response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 13+ years of software development experience across many stacks, but the role requires a people manager with at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years building developer tools like compilers, build systems, or test infrastructure. The resume shows no people management experience, no direct ownership of build systems or test infrastructure at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem background. Technical depth is there, but the management and dev-productivity-tooling requirements are not met.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Demonstrated interest in testing, TDD, and developer enablement (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, Selenium course, refactoring dojos)
Some adjacent tooling work: CI/CD setup, GitLab infrastructure, MCP code generators, AI-agent developer tooling
concerns: No people management or team leadership experience listed — a hard requirement of the role
No experience building developer tools at the scale described (compilers, large-scale build systems, mobile test automation infrastructure)
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience; iOS/Apple TV work is brief and dated (2015-2016)

key_factors.factor: Lacks dev-tools/build-systems/test-infra depth at required scale
Strong testing and developer-enablement mindset (test runner, workshops, TDD)
